# Configuration {.unnumbered}

## Configuration Files

Set up configuration files to carry out certain operations like dropping columns, renaming columns, recoding values - as opposed to hard-coding things in the script.

## Working with Smaller/Modular Files

The brainstorm document also has mentioning this concept about modularity here, but don't know if it fits.

## Working With Multiple Files

importing _single vs. multiple files (lists)_ is mentioned in this section of our brainstorm document, but don't know if it belongs here or elsewhere.
